description.value: They cannot corner you, cannot hold you, cannot make you stand still long enough to be hit cleanly.

system.benefits:
You gain the following permanent abilities:

  • Elusive: Opportunity attacks against you add 1 to both attack dice.
  • Reaction Step: When a hostile creature moves into your melee reach, you may use a [Reaction] to move up to half your movement speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
  • Frictionless: Shadow Step no longer counts against your once per turn limit. You may use it after every melee attack you make
